resources:
Client
Advocate
LawAssistant BASKAR Baskar have an exceptional ability to analyze complex legal issues and provide clear and effective solutions. 
Your passion for justice and advocacy is inspiring, and your clients are fortunate to have you representing them. //maggi ARUNAN
